risks.title: MiniMax same-session reuse contradicts verified provider behavior
risks.action: Deprecate pool; enforce one session per generation.

risks.title: Browser drops mic upload while AI audio or tail gate is active
risks.action: Rewrite capture so upload is continuous during playback.

risks.title: Legacy VoicePipeline would create a second orchestrator beside Pipecat
Caller-controlled LINE userId is trusted as session identity
risks.action: Verify LIFF ID token server-side and derive identity there.

risks.title: Unversioned WebSocket protocol has no generation, sequence, ACK or structured errors
MP3/PCM documentation and implementation disagree
risks.action: Treat MP3 24 kHz mono as verified; PCM remains unknown.

risks.title: Transcript echo heuristic cannot replace acoustic echo cancellation
risks.action: Use browser AEC/far-end reference; retain text filter only as auxiliary signal.

risks.title: Phase plus multiple booleans can diverge
risks.action: Replace with one authoritative Floor State Machine in its authorized milestone.

risks.title: Legacy TypeScript backend directly constructs pipeline instead of Python runtime boundary
risks.action: Build a versioned LIFF-to-Python transport adapter after approval.

risks.title: Compressed playback and pre-connect ASR buffers lack explicit caps
risks.action: Add byte/time caps and overflow policy.

risks.title: Legacy logs include synthesis text, provider messages, traces and response bodies
risks.action: Do not port logs; use PLM redaction helpers.

risks.title: ScriptProcessor combines capture and playback timing in a monolithic hook
risks.action: Rewrite with isolated worklets and deterministic buffer ownership.

risks.title: Filler assets referenced by code are absent from package
risks.action: Do not assume fillers are self-contained; decide separately.

risks.title: Tracked production env file requires deployment-owner review before any reuse
risks.action: Do not copy values; re-provision approved PLM configuration.

risks.title: Repository-wide PLM lint traverses the read-only legacy clone
evidence: uv run --locked ruff check . reported 641 pre-existing legacy findings
uv run --locked ruff check src scripts tests passed
risks.action: Keep validation scoped to PLM sources or explicitly exclude references after separate approval; never auto-fix legacy files.
